text: The alleged PAP report on mobilisation is false. The Polish government spokesperson posted on X immediately denying the content of the false dispatch. PAP published a clarification that the report did not originate from the agency and was not written or sent by PAP journalists. Fact-checking outlet Demagog amplified the correction on X, labeling the mobilization message as fakenews.
attribution_coding_note: Government spokesperson denies the false dispatch's content as 'false'; the stored text attributes the act to no external actor.
